operators.name: CHIEF
operators.description: Executive intelligence briefing agent. Pulls live data from all active operators, delivers briefs with anomalies and ranked actions.

operators.name: RECON
operators.description: Outbound opportunity scanning and research agent.

operators.name: SCOUT
operators.description: Inbound lead capture and qualification engine.

operators.name: Debrief
operators.description: Post-meeting debrief extraction, action logging, and follow-up creation.

operators.name: SOCIAL
operators.description: Conversational campaign review interface. Generates, reviews, and approves social media post packages.

operators.name: Telegram
operators.description: Telegram bot connector — inbound message routing and outbound notifications.

operators.name: WhatsApp Business
operators.description: WhatsApp Business API connector — inbound leads and outbound proposals via Meta Cloud API.

operators.name: Google Accounts
operators.description: Google OAuth2 connector. Provides access tokens for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and Contacts to other operators.

operators.name: Personal Accountant
operators.description: Personal finance tracking — transactions, KPI targets, off-track detection. Localhost-bound and secret-gated.

operators.name: Realtor
operators.description: Property research — saved searches, discovered listings, watchlist. Simulated listings by default (live API is a stub). Localhost-bound and secret-gated.

operators.name: Car Finder
operators.description: Vehicle research — saved searches, discovered vehicles, watchlist. Simulated listings by default (live API is a stub). Localhost-bound and secret-gated.

operators.name: Personal Mentor
operators.description: Goals, KPI progress, wins, and general-wellness check-ins (morning/midday/evening). Motivational only; no medical advice. Localhost-bound and secret-gated.
